_note: Per-game visual-identity research for the follow-overlay sprite + theme work. Sources: Steam store pages (Claude in Chrome, 2026-06-02) + established franchise art direction. item=most iconic object for a sprite; style=aesthetic cue; palette=color direction (prompt + Phase 4 bar/glow); fontWeb=Google-Fonts-ish match for Phase 4 promo/counter. Extend this for the ~20 Triple-C games at Phase 3.
_rule: CARTOONISH (Clay 2026-06-02, supersedes 'artistic-only'): every sprite is a polished CARTOON -- bold black outlines, saturated cel-shaded colors with clear flat color regions (no gradient mush), stylized exaggerated proportions (chunky shapes, big highlights), Saturday-morning / animated-TV / animated-movie energy. Reference: Clash of Clans (which we nailed for the Clash building art), Adventure Time, Steven Universe, The Simpsons, premium mobile-game polish. This applies to ALL games incl. realistic-aesthetic ones (Supermarket Sim, PowerWash, Manor Lords, Witcher 3) and overrides each game's native look -- match the game's SUBJECT MATTER, impose the cartoon STYLE. NOT acceptable: photoreal 3D, glossy 3D-icon renders, realistic painterly digital painting, CRT-fuzz/gritty pixel art, atmospheric horror realism. The prompt template hard-codes the cartoon styling; keep every per-game `style` value cartoon.

eldenring.item: a golden flask with a bronze cap and a red wax seal, glowing crimson liquid inside (a Flask of Crimson Tears)
eldenring.style: polished cartoon, bold black outlines, cel-shaded, fantasy-adventure energy
eldenring.palette: tarnished gold and bright blood-crimson, with deep shadow accents

cyberpunk2077.item: a chunky yellow cyberware chip with magenta and cyan neon accents
cyberpunk2077.style: polished cartoon, bold black outlines, cel-shaded, neon-tech energy
cyberpunk2077.palette: signature acid yellow #FCEE0A with hot-magenta and cyan neon accents on black

supermarket_simulator.item: a chunky shopping cart full of colorful grocery boxes
supermarket_simulator.style: polished cartoon, bold black outlines, cel-shaded, friendly retail energy (NOT photoreal, NOT 3D render)
supermarket_simulator.palette: friendly grocery green and warm white with bright red accents

phasmophobia.item: an EMF reader handheld device with a glowing green LED display
phasmophobia.style: polished cartoon, bold black outlines, cel-shaded, spooky-but-playful energy (cartoon, NOT horror realism)
phasmophobia.palette: dark charcoal device with bright phosphor-green glow accents

balatro.item: a playing-card joker with a big smiling face, red and blue suits
balatro.style: polished cartoon, bold black outlines, cel-shaded, playful card-game energy (cartoon, NOT gritty pixel art)
balatro.palette: deep indigo-navy, card-suit red and blue, bright gold accents

ball_x_pit.item: a colorful cluster of glossy arcade balls
ball_x_pit.style: polished cartoon, bold black outlines, cel-shaded, energetic arcade vibe (cartoon, NOT pixel art)
ball_x_pit.palette: vivid saturated arcade colors - electric cyan, magenta and lime
